ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DEPOSITIONS AND GRANTING SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF LYDIA FLOYD'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DEPOSITIONS AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MAY INQUIRE AS TO THE FACTS AND CIRCURMSTANCES OF COMMUNICATIONS BUT NOT THE CONTENTS OF SUCH COMMUNICATIONS. SANCTIONS AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00. DEPOSITIONS LODGED WITH THE COURT WERE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IN OPEN COURT. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: MATTHEW WERTHEIM, ESQ., 415-775-8950 for Lydia Floyd plaintiff and moving party;
THOMAS FEENEY, ESQ., 510-267-7273 for STUART CLEARY defendant and opposing party:

ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF LYDIA FLOYD's Motion To Compel Further Depositions and Request For Attorney's Fees And Costs is granted. Plaintiff may inquire as to the facts and circurmstances of communications but not the contents of such communications. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $500.00. Depositions lodged with the Court were returned to Plaintiff's counsel in open court. Order was signed in open court. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH. NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)
